title: Nor
description: very cool mods + resource packs that you got to have!
body:
![image-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a8fc4e9c6a52cb7024c8d892d13ef37d7edb8a0.png)

a lot of very cool mods and resorce packs!!
The Nor modpack is the best modpack for new nodrinth players that don't know what mods are the best! 
This modpack has all the mods needed for a beginner who doesn't know which mods and textures to use in their instance!

**_MODS:_**
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [WorldEdit]([https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit))
- [EMF]([https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features))
- [ETF]([https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features))
- [ImmediatelyFast]([https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast))
- [BetterF3]([https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3))
- [Just Enogh Breading]([https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughbreeding))
- [Just Enogh Items]([https://modrinth.com/mod/jei](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei))
- [Simple Voice Chat]([https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat))
- [Cloth Config API]([https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config))
- [Sodium]([https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium))
